user.title: Reef Factory X3 Dosing Pump
user.description:
Enter your Smart Reef account credentials and the X3 Dosing Pump serial number.

The serial number is shown in the Smart Reef app under **Device Settings**.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or password. Check your Smart Reef account credentials.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Reef Factory API. Check your internet connection.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This X3 Dosing Pump device is already configured.
